title: Table
description: Foldkit-native shadcn base-nova Table structural helpers with semantic table parts, local class maps, and deterministic examples for demo, footer, actions, and RTL.

registry.reason: The Table actions example composes the local shadcn Button registry item.
The Table actions example composes the local shadcn Dropdown Menu registry item.
shadcn Table uses local class canonicalization and Tailwind conflict handling.

runtime.reason: Provides Html, Attribute, and html factory APIs for the Foldkit-native helpers.
Provides Effect Schema literals and Array helpers for Table metadata and examples.
Provided through the local utils/cn registry dependency.
Provided through the local utils/cn registry dependency.

development.reason: Origin Table action icons are represented by local inline SVGs in installable source.
Origin RTL example dependency is replaced by local Arabic example constants.
React is origin fixture evidence only, not installable Foldkit source.

examples.title: TableActions
examples.description: Product Table with row action menus using local shadcn Button and Dropdown Menu helpers.

examples.title: TableDemo
examples.description: Invoice Table with caption, header, body, and footer.
examples.snippet: export const TableDemo = (): Html => invoiceTable(defaultInvoiceCopy, invoices)

examples.title: TableFooterExample
examples.description: Invoice Table footer example with a subtotal row.
examples.snippet:
export const TableFooterExample = (): Html =>
  invoiceTable(defaultInvoiceCopy, pipe(invoices, EffectArray.take(3)))

examples.title: TableRtl
examples.description: RTL invoice Table using local Arabic strings instead of the origin language selector.
examples.snippet: export const TableRtl = (): Html => invoiceTable(arabicInvoiceCopy, invoices)

deviations.summary: The Table actions example uses a local inline SVG more icon instead of lucide-react.
deviations.rationale: Installable source cannot depend on lucide-react. The inline SVG preserves the action trigger footprint and aria-hidden contract.

deviations.summary: RTL example uses local Arabic constants instead of the origin language-selector runtime dependency.
deviations.rationale: Installable source cannot depend on the origin app language selector. Local Arabic constants preserve the default RTL rendered output.

deviations.summary: The actions example composes local Foldkit Button and Dropdown Menu helpers instead of the origin React dropdown runtime.
deviations.rationale: The table primitive remains presentational while the action example demonstrates composition through existing local registry items.
